Remarks/Remarques: Rating curve 16.00 is a 2-segment model governed by a cobble/boulder section control. The curve appears stable recently. It is subject to event-based scour/deposition and appears to exhibit progressive scour over time. All open  water measurements from 2019-2023 were used for the creation of this model. Due to the scatter around the curve  caused by the control movement, a mean-curve approach was used to develop rating curve 16.00. See rating  development notes for more details.
